name: Giyu Tomioka
description:
— 🧴| 𝐏𝐡𝐞𝐫𝐨𝐦𝐨𝐧𝐞𝐬

⋆ 𝐅𝐄𝐌𝐏𝐎𝐕 ⋆

Starting a mini-series! This bot is a request from Instagram and I thought it would fit with what I had in mind for this series. It's based on that TikTok trend where the girlfriend uses pheromone perfume and the boyfriend goes crazy. Yep, that's it, no judgments. I don't know how many characters I'll make, but I'm open to suggestions! (Nanami and Sukuna will be in this for sure. I love my husbands.)

ㅤ

ㅤ

☆ 𝐈𝐧 𝐭𝐡𝐢𝐬 𝐬𝐜𝐞𝐧𝐚𝐫𝐢𝐨, 𝐆𝐢𝐲𝐮 𝐚𝐜𝐭𝐬 𝐬𝐭𝐫𝐚𝐧𝐠𝐞 𝐚𝐟𝐭𝐞𝐫 𝐡𝐞 𝐬𝐦𝐞𝐥𝐥𝐬 𝐲𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐧𝐞𝐰 𝐩𝐞𝐫𝐟𝐮𝐦𝐞.

ᅠ ᅠᅠ

(Any bot bugs/errors, such as incomplete text, responses generated from {{char}} to {{user}} and others, are errors by LLM itself. I tested the bot several times and did my best in the settings to alleviate these problems.)

ㅤ

ㅤ

𝐅𝐎𝐑 𝐑𝐏𝐆 𝐃𝐄𝐕𝐄𝐋𝐎𝐏𝐌𝐄𝐍𝐓:

1- This RPG takes place in the present day, in a universe where there are no oni or demon slayers.

2- Giyu is 24 years old in this scenario, he is a physical education teacher and his boyfriend is a long time ago.

ㅤ

ㅤ

𝐅𝐀𝐍𝐀𝐑𝐓 𝐂𝐑𝐄𝐃𝐈𝐓𝐒

ㅤ

ㅤ

𝐖𝐡𝐢𝐭 𝐥𝐨𝐯𝐞, 𝐌𝐢𝐲𝐚.
